message.content:
@startuml
participant as Client
participant as RegisterClientUI
participant as RegisterClientController
participant as ApplicationPOT
participant as app_ApplicationPOT
participant as EncryptPassword
participant as EmailSender
participant as DataHandler

RegisterClientUI ..> Client : Engages the register feature/button
RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientUI : Asks for all the information required
RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientUI : Fills all the information required
RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientUI : Presents the data and asks for a confirmation
RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientUI : Confirms

RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientController : registerNewClient(name, email, password, latitude, longitude, altitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country, creditCardNr, validityDate, CCV)

RegisterClientController ..> RegisterClientUI : create()
RegisterClientController ..> clientServiceClientService : create()
clientServiceClientService ..> clientDBClientDB : create()
clientDBClientDB ..> RegisterClientUI : validateInput(name, email, password, latitude, longitude, altitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country, creditCardNr, validityDate, CCV)

alt (if all the information given as input has a valid format)
    RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientController : newClient(name, email, password, latitude, longitude, altitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country, creditCardNr, validityDate, CCV)
    RegisterClientController ..> clientClientClient : create(name, email, password, latitude, longitude, altitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country, creditCardNr, validityDate, CCV)
    clientClientClient ..> clientUserUser : create(email, password, name)
    clientUserUser ..> EncryptPassword : encryptPassword(MD5(password))
    EncryptPassword ..> clientClientClient : create(latitude, longitude, altitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country)
    clientClientClient ..> clientCreditCardClient : create(creditCardNr, validityDate, CCV)
    clientCreditCardClient ..> DataHandler : Address
    clientClientClient ..> clientDBClient : registerNewClient(client)
    clientDBClient ..> clientDBClient : addClientToDBClients
    clientDBClient ..> clientDBClient : ref 10, CONNECTIONS
    clientDBClient ..> EmailSender : sendEmail(email, subject, body)
    EmailSender ..> DataHandler : sendEmail(email, subject, body)
    DataHandler ..> Client : Validates and informs about the success of the operation
    DataHandler ..> Client : (if any information does not have a valid format)
    DataHandler ..> Client : informs the User that the operation was not successful
else
    RegisterClientUI ..> RegisterClientController : registerNewClient(client)
    RegisterClientController ..> clientDBClient : addClientToDBClients
    clientDBClient ..> clientDBClient : ref 10, CONNECTIONS
    clientDBClient ..> EmailSender : sendEmail(email, subject, body)
    EmailSender ..> DataHandler : sendEmail(email, subject, body)
    DataHandler ..> Client : Validates and informs about the success of the operation
    DataHandler ..> Client : (if any information does not have a valid format)
    DataHandler ..> Client : informs the User that the operation was not successful
@enduml
